ketaminLines: One of my patients once put it this way:
Talk therapy is like walking on foot.
Behavioral therapy is like riding a bicycle.
Ketamine-assisted therapy is like driving a Ferrari.”
sublines: There can be another way to reach the depths.
Not only through understanding, but through inner experience.
whyUs: Complemented by a holistic treatment plan.

faqItems.q: Is ketamine therapy legal in Germany?
faqItems.a: Yes. Ketamine has been an approved medication in Germany for decades, primarily for anesthesia and pain therapy. Its use for depression, trauma and related indications is off-label. That means an approved medication is being used outside its original licensing, under medical responsibility and after careful individual assessment. This approach is well established in the medical community, scientifically well studied and standard practice in specialized centers worldwide.

faqItems.q: Is this covered by health insurance?
faqItems.a: Not as a rule. Ketamine-assisted therapy is a private-pay service. We discuss the costs transparently during the initial consultation.
No, not in a therapeutic setting. The risk of dependence arises with uncontrolled, frequent use, not with physician-supervised sessions at defined intervals.

faqItems.q: What if I feel unwell during the session?
faqItems.a: You are continuously accompanied 1:1 by a physician. Monitoring, safety tools and immediate intervention are available at all times. An important advantage of intravenous administration: ketamine takes effect within minutes and is metabolized just as quickly. The effect can be steered precisely throughout the session, gently tapered or, if needed, deepened. At any time, under medical supervision.

faqItems.q: For whom may this path not be suitable?
faqItems.a: In cases of active psychosis, uncontrolled heart disease, schizophrenia, pregnancy or acute substance use disorder, ketamine is not the right choice. We clarify this in the preliminary consultation.

extras.ctaSubtitle: No pressure. No commitment. An open conversation about what has been tried so far and whether this path might be right for you.
extras.ctaFootnote: Go deeper — all the details, studies and mechanisms — read more about ketamine and the science behind it on the blog.

schemaFaq.name: What is ketamine-assisted therapy?
schemaFaq.text: Ketamine-assisted therapy combines physician-supervised ketamine infusions or shots with psychotherapeutic preparation and follow-up to treat depression, trauma and treatment-resistant symptoms.

schemaFaq.name: Who is ketamine therapy for?
schemaFaq.text: It can be an option for treatment-resistant depression, post-traumatic stress disorder or chronic stress when conventional approaches have not worked sufficiently. The indication is established in an initial medical consultation.

schemaFaq.name: How does a ketamine infusion in Berlin work?
schemaFaq.text: After an initial medical consultation and indication assessment, the infusion is administered in the practice under physician supervision. The treatment lasts approximately 60–90 minutes including preparation and follow-up.

schemaFaq.name: Does health insurance cover the costs?
schemaFaq.text: Ketamine therapy is generally not a statutory health insurance benefit in Germany and is billed privately. You will receive a precise cost overview during the initial consultation.

koerperlicheSymptome.seoTitle: Understanding Physical Symptoms – Root-Cause Medicine in Berlin
koerperlicheSymptome.seoDescription: When standard medicine has no answers: root-cause diagnostics in Berlin for unspecific and chronic physical symptoms.
koerperlicheSymptome.heroTitlePrefix: You have symptoms - but no clear
koerperlicheSymptome.heroSubtitle: Unremarkable test results don't mean everything is fine. Often, what's missing is an understanding of the connections within your system.
recognizeItems: Your lab values are "okay" - but you don't feel okay
You've seen several specialists, but no one can help you
You've tried many things with short-term effects, but no lasting stability
The cause stays unclear or gets explained away too quickly
koerperlicheSymptome.quotePrefix: You're looking for a solution, not a magic pill. I don't have one either. What I do have for you:
koerperlicheSymptome.quoteSuffix: And a path that takes you and your symptoms seriously.
koerperlicheSymptome.perspectiveP1: "Unremarkable findings" don't necessarily mean there's nothing there.
koerperlicheSymptome.perspectiveP2: Often, the search only covers what's visible in standard testing.
koerperlicheSymptome.perspectiveP3: Sometimes a key piece of the puzzle is simply missing.
koerperlicheSymptome.approachP1: I see you as a whole person - not as a single diagnosis. Through the lens of clinical psychoneuroimmunology, anthroposophic medicine, functional medicine, genetics and toxicology.
koerperlicheSymptome.approachP2: And I stay with it. Because I'm the doctor who doesn't walk away when something is still unclear. I keep going with you until we gain more and more insight.
koerperlicheSymptome.diagnostikTitle: Tailored to your story, not "more is better"
koerperlicheSymptome.diagnostikP1: You want to be understood and heard, not just run through more tests. That's why my focus is on understanding the connections. I work with one of Germany's largest labs and use targeted blood analyses to gather exactly the information that's truly relevant for you. Not in the sense of "more is better," but as a basis for clear, well-founded decisions.
koerperlicheSymptome.exampleP1: A deficiency is rarely the actual root cause.
koerperlicheSymptome.exampleP2Prefix: If you're low on omega-3, for instance, I don't just ask
koerperlicheSymptome.exampleP2Suffix: it's missing. And what that specifically means for you. Inflammation, stress, regeneration, gut, metabolism? That's how supplementation becomes logical.
koerperlicheSymptome.includesTitle: Everything you need in one appointment!

includesItems.title: Consultation
includesItems.desc: Before we recommend anything, we understand your body, your story and your goals.

includesItems.title: Diagnostics
includesItems.desc: Targeted lab analyses, functional tests and clinical assessment. Tailored individually to your symptoms.

includesItems.title: Health plan
includesItems.desc: You don't get generic advice, but a concrete plan. Tailored exactly to you, with clear next steps.

includesItems.title: Mentoring
includesItems.desc: We support you long-term, adjust your plan, and stay by your side until you really get to where you want to be.

fitItems: You want to understand what's really going on
You're ready to take action and integrate it into your daily life
You're looking for a solution - not just an illusion

faq.q: Why has nothing been found in me until now?
faq.a: Because the search often only looks for standard causes and not for functional connections.

faq.q: Do you run a lot of tests?
faq.a: Yes. I work with diagnostics, but very selectively. My goal isn't to run endless tests, only exactly what's truly meaningful for you. That way we avoid unnecessary costs and still get the information we need.

faq.q: Will I just be given supplements?
faq.a: Supplements are something you'd get from your coach or AI coach. With me, they're used specifically within orthomolecular medicine - meaning medically and individually tailored to you. That can also include higher dosages to achieve a therapeutic effect. Supplements are part of a therapy with me and far more than just classic nutritional support.

faq.q: Can you guarantee my symptoms will improve?
faq.a: No. But we proceed in a structured way and don't give up too quickly. It's important to me to actively support you through the process and to strengthen you mentally as well. Because real change often requires both: a clear plan and the motivation to follow through with it.

faq.q: How quickly will I notice a change?
faq.a: That's very individual. In my experience, many patients feel the first changes within 2-4 weeks. If the desired effect doesn't appear, we adjust the therapy specifically and recalibrate.

We look at this carefully. Mind and body are connected, that's true. But "psychological" is not automatically the explanation for unremarkable standard test results. That's why we always investigate both. And we include both in the treatment. You won't simply be sent away here. Instead, we look together at which factors really play a role for you and how they interact.

koerperlicheSymptome.ctaTitle: Let's find the missing puzzle piece together.
koerperlicheSymptome.ctaSubtitle: And turn it into a plan that really works for you and your life.

ueberMich.seoDescription: Internal medicine specialist, Functional Medicine and Longevity expert in Berlin. Experience, training and the holistic treatment approach of Dr. Shukri Jarmoukli.
ueberMich.heroLead: I'm a doctor. But I don't work the way you may be used to.
ueberMich.section1Para: I don't see a person as the sum of individual symptoms, but as a living system in which everything is interconnected: body, mind, biochemistry, lifestyle. I'm not only interested in what isn't working, but in why it has fallen out of balance. Because that is exactly where lasting change can begin — by working on the root causes, not just on individual symptoms.
ueberMich.pullQuote1: What drives me is not only knowledge — but my own experience.
ueberMich.section2Para: Driven by my own story of suffering and that of the people closest to me, I tried countless methods. Many things worked, and many simply didn't. What did work was not part of my medical school training. I couldn't understand why these things were never even mentioned. That's why I pursued extensive further training, did a lot of research and uncovered valuable knowledge that has no place in the classical curriculum — yet has changed my life and the lives of many others.
ueberMich.section3Heading: The biggest turning point for me was the cold.
ueberMich.coldQuoteRest: didn't just change my body, it changed my mind. My resilience. My ability to handle stress. I freed myself from my depressive symptoms.
ueberMich.coldQuoteSecondary: At the same time, I realised how little this is part of classical medical training either — even though there are over 1,300 studies on it, and yet zero teaching content.
ueberMich.section4Para1: My engagement with alternative approaches did not start from any esoteric motivation, but from the wish to translate scientific findings into a practice that actually works. It is often assumed that everything outside of conventional medicine is by definition unscientific. That view falls short. Many approaches are scientifically well-founded, but so far have no firm place in established treatment concepts.
ueberMich.section4Para2: Through my continuous further training and my practical work with patients across different medical disciplines — including Lifestyle Medicine, Functional Medicine, Anthroposophic Medicine, Orthomolecular Medicine, genetics and epigenetics, toxicology and environmental medicine, as well as psychotherapeutic and biodynamic methods including ketamine-assisted therapy — I have developed an integrative treatment system.
ueberMich.section4Para3: This system combines the respective strengths of each approach into a clearly structured overall concept. The goal is not to apply methods in isolation side by side, but to align them so that meaningful synergies arise and the individual measures reinforce each other instead of contradicting one another.
ueberMich.section4Para4: Such a broadly based and at the same time systematically integrated approach is rare. It makes it possible to view patients not one-dimensionally, but in their full complexity — and to offer truly individualised, holistic therapies.
ueberMich.section4Para5: Not in order to do as much as possible, but in order to understand the connections that are often overlooked. Not as an arbitrary combination of different forms of medicine, but as a structured concept in which every approach has its clear place — with the aim of enabling a genuinely holistic perspective and an integrated treatment. My work begins where standard solutions end.
ueberMich.section4Para6: Along the way, I accompany you as a mentor. Because lifestyle optimisation is often the foundation of any lasting improvement, and this is exactly where many people fail — not because of a lack of knowledge, but because of difficulties with implementation. The best therapy cannot achieve anything if it isn't actually lived. That's why more than a treatment plan is needed: it takes guidance, fine-tuning and genuine support throughout the entire process of change.
ueberMich.section5Para: I have freed myself from health problems and have helped many other people do the same. Not through a single miracle cure, but through consistent change with a clear plan and structure. It is exactly this experience that I now pass on.
ueberMich.closingPart1: My goal is not only that you feel better. My goal is that you understand
ueberMich.closingPart2: — and that you get to know your body so well that you become independent in the long term. I know I've done my work well when my patients eventually need me less.
ueberMich.closingSocialsLead: Want to learn more about my personal story? Then just click the button below or check out my socials!

psychotherapie.seoDescription: Psychotherapeutic support and ketamine-assisted approaches in Berlin — an integrative approach for depression, trauma and chronic stress.

hero.subtitle: My approach is to synchronize sensations, feelings, thoughts and actions with you. The goal: to support you, as quickly as possible, on the path toward your better self.

recognize.title: You might recognize yourself here
recognize.intro: Two starting points, one shared wish. Tap the points where you recognize yourself.
recognize.colASub: You sense that something is there, but you don't quite know where to start.
recognize.colBSub: You've understood a lot, but it hasn't fully landed yet.
noTherapyYet: You haven't been in psychotherapy before, but you sense that you want to go deeper than self-reflection alone.
You experience physical symptoms like restlessness, tightness, dizziness or a vague feeling in the body — and you can't explain where it comes from.
You feel partly at the mercy of your thoughts or emotions and wish for more stability and control.
hadTherapy: You understand your patterns, but you can't quite manage to actually change your behavior.
You can categorize things, but you can't really feel them.
You're more stable — meaning you function, but you don't feel alive.
You know what you should do, but it doesn't really happen.
recognize.footerQuote: You don't quite feel that you've fully arrived in yourself.
recognize.footerSub: That's not a failure and not a coincidence. It only shows that your previous approach is reaching its limit — and that another path is possible.
recognize.counterSingular: point recognized — you're not alone with this
recognize.counterPlural: points recognized — you're not alone with this

missing.title: What is often missing
missing.intro: Many approaches work on only one level of awareness. Real change happens when all four are in contact at the same time.
missing.statusAssoz: Levels synchronized — all flowing in the same rhythm
missing.statusDissoz: Levels isolated — each following its own rhythm
missing.bodyP1: Many approaches work with only one level of awareness — for example with thinking (talk therapy) or with behavior (behavioral therapy). Others focus more on the body or on feelings.
missing.bodyP2: Each of these methods can be effective. For many people, however, working on just one level isn't enough.
missing.pullquote: Change often happens faster when all forms are brought into alignment. Thinking, feeling, body and action work together.
missing.closing: You don't change because you force yourself, but because, inside, you've arrived at a different point.

cards.label: Beyond the head
cards.title: Beyond the head
cards.desc: Sensation and feeling move back to the center

cards.label: Connecting understanding with experience
cards.title: Connecting understanding with experience
cards.desc: Change isn't only thought — it's felt

methods.title: Methods
methods.intro: Three approaches that interlock. Click a circle to learn more.

items.label: Biodynamic Psychotherapy
items.title: Biodynamic Psychotherapy
items.lead: The body remembers, even when the mind has already moved on.
paragraphs: In biodynamic work, your body becomes a co-speaker. We work with breath, embodied movement and subtle impulses to engage where words alone no longer reach. Old patterns of tension are allowed to release, without you having to first understand or explain them.
Especially helpful if you feel head-heavy, have physical symptoms, or sense that classical talk therapy is reaching its limit.

items.label: Behavioral Therapy Tools
items.title: Behavioral Therapy Tools
items.lead: Concrete tools for concrete everyday situations.
paragraphs: When you want to know what you can do differently tomorrow morning, clearly structured methods from cognitive behavioral therapy help. Cognitive reappraisal, exposure work, anchoring new patterns, and practical strategies for acute situations.
These tools are especially valuable if you've already understood what is weighing on you, but don't yet know how to do things differently in everyday life.

items.label: Ketamine-Assisted Work
items.title: Ketamine-Assisted Work
items.lead: A window through which new perspectives can become tangible.
paragraphs: Ketamine can temporarily loosen rigid patterns of thinking and feeling and open a space in which themes are not only understood, but truly experienced. The actual work then happens in the therapeutic support before and after.
Indicated especially in treatment-resistant depression, severe blockages, or when the feeling persists of standing at your own surface and not getting any further.

steps.title: Orientation call (15 minutes)
steps.desc: A first conversation to clarify whether and how I can support you.

steps.title: Intake
steps.desc: We map out your starting point, your goals, and your history so far.

steps.title: Decision
steps.desc: Together we define which approaches and therapies make sense for you.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.desc: Therapy unfolds in a structured, supported way — with regular sessions and adjustments.

fit.title: Who this is for:
items: You're missing depth in your experience
fit.crisisNote: In acute crises, please use local emergency services.

items.q: What sets your approach apart from classical psychotherapy?
items.a: We don't work only through conversation — we also include your body and direct experience.

items.q: I've already done therapy. Why should I start again?
items.a: Many therapies work on only one level. With me, it's about connecting sensation, feeling and thinking — because that's exactly where the change that was missing before often happens.

items.q: Do I have to be treated with ketamine?
items.a: No. Ketamine is an option, but not the core of my work. What matters is the overall approach and what makes sense for you individually.

items.q: What does a session look like?
items.a: There's no rigid format. We work responsively together — conversation, body awareness and integration interlock.
Experiences from the session are translated into concrete steps — so your change doesn't stay in the room, but takes effect in your everyday life.
That's very individual. Many patients notice fairly early shifts in their experience, regulation or clarity. What matters is that something shifts long-term and sustainably — not just briefly.

finalCta.headline: Maybe this is YOUR MISSING PIECE.

praeventionLongevity.seoDescription: Longevity and prevention medicine in Berlin: genetics, biofeedback, CGM, HRV, mentoring. Individual strategies for more energy, clarity and healthy years.
praeventionLongevity.heroSubtitle: More energy. More clarity. More aliveness. Through strategies that fit you personally.
praeventionLongevity.chaosBody: You try things out; supplements, diets, routines. Something works for a while, then suddenly it doesn't anymore. So you keep looking for new approaches.
praeventionLongevity.overlookedBody1: I don't want to be the next expert telling you what's "right" or "wrong". I want you to understand what works for you.
praeventionLongevity.overlookedBody2: That's why I don't work with assumptions, but with feedback from your own body.
praeventionLongevity.hrvDesc: Shows you how your nervous system is responding
praeventionLongevity.cgmDesc: Shows you how your metabolism reacts to the way you live
praeventionLongevity.overlookedClosing: You don't have to guess anymore. You can see what works.
praeventionLongevity.systemLogicTitle: All of it with system logic behind it
praeventionLongevity.systemLogicBody: I work with comprehensive genome and genetic testing to understand your individuality. Not superficially, but in depth and medically interpreted. Unlike many coaching approaches, my work isn't based on theory alone. I've been through a lot of this myself and bring that experience deliberately into the work.

processSteps.title: Genetics
processSteps.description: How you were born: your genetic foundation is tested and medically interpreted.

processSteps.title: Current state
processSteps.description: We capture your current state in depth, through extended blood analyses, bioimpedance analysis and advanced cardiac assessments.

processSteps.title: Implementation
processSteps.description: Targeted use of biohacking tools and methods, fully tailored to you.

processSteps.title: Your body's response
processSteps.description: We measure how your body reacts to changes, for example through biofeedback like HRV or CGM.

processSteps.title: Therapeutic support
processSteps.description: When useful, we add infusions and modern longevity substances like NAD+ or spermidine.

praeventionLongevity.mentoringBody: It's important to understand this: not everyone can work this way. It isn't only about knowledge, but about the ability to recognise connections and think in systems. That takes far more than isolated pieces of information. It takes solid training, real experience and consistent application in practice.

mentoringCards.label: Stabilising metabolism
mentoringCards.title: Stabilising metabolism
mentoringCards.desc: Metabolism is the foundation of your energy. When it works in balance, your body can use nutrients efficiently, keep blood sugar steady and renew its cells.

mentoringCards.label: Regulating the nervous system
mentoringCards.title: Regulating the nervous system
mentoringCards.desc: Your nervous system decides whether you live in chronic stress or can really regenerate. We strengthen your vagal tone, dissolve old stress patterns and bring safety back into your body.

mentoringCards.label: Easing the immune system
mentoringCards.title: Easing the immune system
mentoringCards.desc: An overloaded immune system is often the silent driver of chronic complaints. By resolving silent inflammation, environmental burdens and gut issues, your immune system can do what it's actually built for again.

praeventionLongevity.diagnostikSubtitle: You don't need 20 tests. You need the right ones.

diagnostikItems.detail: Your system is constantly running at full speed, even when you long since want to settle down. Your HRV shows us how deeply you're really under tension and where regeneration becomes possible again.
Motivated in the morning, empty in the afternoon, wide awake at night. A CGM makes visible how your blood sugar steers your energy and where small adjustments make the biggest difference.
You eat clean, move, sleep, and still nothing changes. Targeted lab diagnostics show what's really going on beneath the surface and where your body is currently blocked.

praeventionLongevity.diagnostikBody1: Diagnostics is not an end in itself. It serves a decision. We gather enough relevant information to truly understand you as a whole. You get a clear picture of where you come from (genetics), where you stand right now (current state) and which concrete options exist to improve.
praeventionLongevity.diagnostikBody2: Every result is explained in plain terms, from genetic testing through blood values to all further investigations. On that basis we build a structured, individual plan.
praeventionLongevity.hebelIntro: The individual methods are no secret. What matters is the overall concept behind them, that is, how all the steps are meaningfully connected.

hebel.label: Sleep & rhythm
hebel.title: Sleep & rhythm
hebel.lead: Everything begins with the rhythm in which your body regenerates.
paragraphs: In deep sleep your nervous system repairs itself, in REM sleep you process emotions, and your circadian rhythm steers hormones, metabolism and cellular ageing.
We look at your sleep quality, your light and movement patterns, and bring your daily rhythm back to the beat in which your body can really age the way it should.

hebel.label: Nutrition with feedback
hebel.title: Nutrition with feedback
hebel.lead: What's healthy, your own body shows you.
paragraphs: Instead of generic recommendations, we work with real data from your body: glucose curves from a CGM, lab markers, micronutrient status and your subjective signals.
Nutrition stops being a dogma and becomes a tool you understand, one that measurably fits you.

hebel.label: Training & recovery
hebel.title: Training & recovery
hebel.lead: Muscle is the organ of ageing.
paragraphs: Whoever maintains muscle mass, strength and mitochondrial capacity stays healthier, more resilient and mentally clearer for longer.
Recovery in between matters just as much. We bring training and rest into a balance where your body becomes stronger instead of more exhausted.

hebel.label: Stress regulation
hebel.title: Stress regulation
hebel.lead: In alarm mode, your body cannot heal.
paragraphs: Chronic stress is one of the strongest accelerators of biological ageing. It keeps your nervous system in alarm, disrupts sleep, hormones and digestion, and silently drains your reserves.
Through HRV measurement, breathwork, somatic methods and targeted regulation, your system learns again to switch between tension and real recovery.

hebel.label: Supplements
hebel.title: Targeted use of supplements
hebel.lead: Only what your lab shows and your daily life needs.
paragraphs: Supplements don't replace a lifestyle, but they can close specific gaps that would otherwise hold you back. Only what shows up in the lab and makes sense in your daily life is actually used.
The goal is not as much as possible, but exactly what your body needs right now, in the right form and dose.

hebel.label: Infusions
hebel.title: Meaningful infusions
hebel.lead: Straight into the bloodstream, where they actually work.
paragraphs: When your body can no longer absorb well through the gut or quickly noticeable effects matter, infusions are a powerful tool. Nutrients, amino acids or molecules like NAD+ go directly into the blood and therefore exactly where they need to act.
We use infusions only where they fit your picture, targeted, dosed and embedded in your overall concept.

startSteps.title: Decision
startSteps.desc: What we measure - and what we don't, individually for your case

fitItems: You're ready to put things into practice
You're looking for clarity, not trends

faq.q: What does longevity mean in your approach?
faq.a: Longevity is not a single tool or a trend, but a comprehensive system. It's about understanding and steering your body in such a way that health, energy and performance stay stable in the long run.
No. Biohacking often works with isolated tools. The difference is that longevity places those tools in context and integrates them into a working overall system.

faq.q: What does this actually give me in everyday life?
faq.a: More stable energy, better sleep, clearer thinking and a body that doesn't constantly feel like it's working "against you".

faq.q: Do I need a lot of supplements for this?
faq.a: No. Supplements are only one part and I use them very deliberately. Not by trend, but by need.
No. They can be supportive, but they don't replace a holistic structure. Without a working overall concept, even the best substances don't work.

faq.q: Do I have to completely change my life?
faq.a: It's about identifying the right levers, not changing everything. Simply eating well and exercising isn't enough, because every body works differently. Two people can do the same thing and respond completely differently to it.
Through feedback from your body and targeted data: blood values, biofeedback (e.g. HRV, CGM) and your actual day-to-day development.

faq.q: How quickly will I notice results?
faq.a: Initial changes in focus, sleep and energy levels often appear within just a few weeks. The deeper effect, however, is long-term.

praeventionLongevity.finalCtaBody: Then book your appointment now or get your free Start Guide.

experience.seoDescription: The Vivecura Experience – a structured day centered on diagnostics, consultation and longevity methods in Berlin.

chapters.title: Comprehensive diagnostics
chapters.subtitle: Digital X-ray, intraoral camera and clinical examination — so we have a complete picture of your dental health from the very beginning.

chapters.title: Personal consultation
chapters.subtitle: We take 45 minutes to discuss your findings in context — symptoms, lifestyle and your individual goals.

chapters.title: Your health plan
chapters.subtitle: You receive a clear summary of the key findings, prioritized recommendations and concrete next steps.

beratung.seoDescription: Personal medical consultation in Berlin: initial assessment, second opinion, and individual treatment planning in functional medicine.
beratung.title: Your medical consultation
beratung.subtitle:
I listen, sort through complexity, and think across disciplines.
(Conventional medicine × Lifestyle medicine × Anthroposophic & functional medicine × Toxicology × Genetics).
You leave with clear recommendations for diagnostics and an action plan based on the VIVECURA approach.
In other words: a plan for lifestyle, plant-based remedies, and nutrient therapy.

cards.back: A 30-minute conversation with room for your symptoms, story, and biography. Your subjective experience is always taken seriously.
Multiple medical disciplines. One coherent thread.
Only the tests that will actually change your next steps.
Lifestyle changes (nutrition, sleep, stress, movement, detoxification) combined with plant-based remedies and nutrient therapy (infusion if indicated).

mentoring.seoDescription: Personal 1:1 mentoring for putting individual longevity and health strategies into practice — physician-guided, practical, and measurable.

focusCards.label: 1:1 mentoring – online or in person
focusCards.title: 1:1 mentoring – online or in person
focusCards.desc: Regular sessions with short impulses and check-ins in between to keep momentum.

focusCards.label: Biofeedback as your compass
focusCards.title: Biofeedback as your compass
focusCards.desc: HRV, BIA, CGM, and sleep/energy signals show what's working — so we can calibrate dose, timing, and sequence.

focusCards.label: Self-efficacy as the goal
focusCards.title: Self-efficacy as the goal
focusCards.desc: You'll learn to read your own signals. Over time, you'll need me less and less.

processSteps.title: Free introductory call
lines: We meet personally (online) and find out together whether we're a good fit.
If it feels right, we move on to the medical consultation.

processSteps.title: Medical starting appointment
lines: A medical consultation with full anamnesis and recommendations for diagnostics is a must — to rule out red flags.

processSteps.title: Precise diagnostics — well beyond the typical lab:
lines: Blood, urine, stool, and genetic analyses for maximum personalization.
Screening for nutrient deficiencies, silent inflammation, environmental toxins, microbiome, parasites, mold, and much more!

processSteps.title: Your plan based on your results:
lines: No one-size-fits-all plan — tailored strategies that fit your everyday life.
Optimization of nutrition, sleep, movement, detoxification, and stress — guided by scientific data and lab results.

processSteps.title: Weekly 1:1 calls to put the plan into practice:
lines: You're guided step by step through change.
With tips, tricks, and support, you'll move through major changes with ease.

processSteps.title: Biofeedback support:
lines: We work from data, not assumptions.
Sensors provide real-time analysis of how your body responds.
They measure things like your HRV and blood glucose so we can fine-tune your nutrition, sleep quality, and stress resilience.

processSteps.title: Anchoring until self-efficacy
lines: We stay with it until the plan has become second nature — and you've learned enough to keep it going independently.

flipGrid.title: Medical Mentoring
flipGrid.subtitle: My mentoring approach is divided into four areas that work together to help you reach your individual goals.

cards.back: Your individual plan, based on your lab values and body composition. Sustainable patterns instead of rigid diets — for energy, performance, and recovery.
We analyze your sleep architecture and disruptors such as light, cortisol, and micronutrients. The goal: deeper sleep and better recovery.
Measurable markers like HRV and a daily cortisol profile reveal your stress load. From there: targeted tools — breathing techniques, nervous-system regulation, and coaching.
Targeted micronutrients and active ingredients, matched to your labs and history. Oral or by IV infusion for fast, noticeable effects.

koerperlich.label: Physical Symptoms
koerperlich.title: Physical Symptoms
koerperlich.desc: Analyzing causes and connections as the foundation for targeted diagnostics and therapy.

praevention.label: Prevention & Longevity
praevention.title: Prevention & Longevity
praevention.desc: Early detection and targeted measures for the long-term stabilization of health and performance.

psychisch.label: Mental Health Concerns
psychisch.title: Mental Health Concerns
psychisch.desc: Holistic therapeutic approaches to stabilize mental health and foster inner balance.

beratung.label: Consultation
beratung.subtitle: Comprehensive medical history and individual treatment plan, tailored to your body, lifestyle, and personal needs.

diagnostik.label: Diagnostics
diagnostik.subtitle: Precise diagnostics that go beyond standard labs and provide deeper insight into your personal health markers.

infusion.label: Infusion
infusion.subtitle: Individualized infusion protocols – including specialized applications such as ketamine and mold therapy.

mentoring.label: Mentoring
mentoring.subtitle: Understanding your treatment plan and integrating it into daily life sustainably — with a focus on nutrition, movement, mindset, and stress balance.

lines: We accompany you on your journey: from chronic complaints to chronic health!
No more trial and error on your own.

items.title: The Person
items.text: You are at the center — not your diagnosis, not your lab values. Everything I do has a single goal: that you truly feel better. More energy, more clarity, more quality of life. Your wellbeing is the measure of everything. The various methods around this circle are pathways toward it — individual, holistic, and tailored to you.

items.title: Functional Medicine
items.text: Functional Medicine is the foundation of my approach. It views the body not in isolation, but as an interconnected system in which symptoms express deeper underlying relationships. I don't want to merely treat — I want to understand the causes and address them precisely. This creates a form of therapy that is both individual and sustainable. All other methods build on this understanding.

items.title: Anthroposophic Medicine
items.text: Anthroposophic medicine sees the human being not only as a body, but as a whole: with their inner processes, their biography, and their individual expression. It complements conventional medicine with a dimension that is often overlooked — the interplay of body, psyche, and the way one lives.

items.title: Toxicology
items.text: Our bodies are confronted daily with influences we often don't see. Pollutants from food, air, or everyday products can disturb our inner balance — frequently going unnoticed for a long time. Toxicology makes these connections visible. Through targeted analysis and targeted unburdening, we create the conditions for genuine, tangible change.

items.title: Lifestyle Medicine
items.text: Sleep, nutrition, movement, and stress management. These four areas shape your health every day, whether you notice it or not. If they are out of balance, even other therapies can only go so far. Lifestyle medicine starts here. I help you analyze, understand, and gradually adjust these areas.

items.title: Genetics & Epigenetics
items.text: Your genetics are your starting point. They determine how your body fundamentally works. But your lifestyle and your environment influence these genes far more than most people realize. That is precisely what epigenetics shows: much of what seems genetically fixed is in fact changeable. We use this knowledge to focus exactly where you and your body truly need support.

items.title: Biohacking
items.text: Biohacking means understanding your body better and using that knowledge purposefully. It's about actively shaping your energy, performance, and health through the right tools and routines. That can mean targeted nutrition strategies, light and sleep optimization, cold exposure, or using data from your everyday life. Not as an end in itself, but as a way to truly get to know your body and bring out the best in yourself.

items.title: Coaching & Everyday Implementation
items.text: Positive change doesn't come from knowledge alone — it comes from the right way of putting it into practice. That's why I accompany you in integrating insights into your daily life. Step by step. At a pace that's optimal for you. It's not about perfection — it's about bringing the right things into your life sustainably.

legal.seoDescription: Legal notice and privacy policy for the private medical practice of Shukri Jarmoukli (Vivecura) in Berlin.

tmgInfo.heading: Information pursuant to § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)
tmgInfo.line2: Ärztliche Privatpraxis Shukri Jarmoukli (private medical practice)

responsible.heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV

professionalRules.heading: Professional title and applicable professional regulations
professionalRules.title: Professional title: Physician (Arzt)
professionalRules.granted: Granted in: Federal Republic of Germany (medical licence issued in 2020 in North Rhine-Westphalia)

vat.heading: Value Added Tax
vat.text: The services provided by Vivecura are exempt from VAT as medical treatment within the meaning of § 4 No. 14 lit. a UStG (German VAT Act). A VAT identification number pursuant to § 27 a UStG therefore does not exist.

euDispute.heading: EU dispute resolution
euDispute.before: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
euDispute.after: You can find our email address above in this legal notice.

consumerDispute.heading: Dispute resolution before a consumer arbitration body
consumerDispute.text: We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration body.

contentLiability.heading: Liability for content
contentLiability.p1: As a service provider we are responsible under § 7 (1) TMG for our own content on this website in accordance with general laws. Pursuant to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obliged as a service provider to monitor third-party information transmitted or stored on our site, or to investigate circumstances that suggest unlawful activity.
contentLiability.p2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. Liability in this respect is, however, only possible from the point in time at which a specific legal infringement becomes known. Upon becoming aware of any such legal infringements we will remove the relevant content immediately.

linkLiability.heading: Liability for links
linkLiability.p1: Our website contains links to external third-party websites whose content we have no influence over. We therefore cannot accept any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.
linkLiability.p2: The linked pages were checked for possible legal infringements at the time of linking. No unlawful content was identifiable at the time of linking. Permanent monitoring of the content of linked pages is, however, unreasonable without specific indications of a legal infringement. Upon becoming aware of any legal infringements, we will remove such links immediately.

copyright.heading: Copyright
copyright.p1: The content and works on this website created by the site operator are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this website are permitted only for private, non-commercial use.
copyright.p2: Insofar as the content on this website was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. In particular, third-party content is identified as such. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please notify us accordingly. Upon becoming aware of any legal infringements we will remove such content immediately.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.statusLine: Last updated: November 2025 · Applies to: the website vivecura.com

controller.heading: 1. Controller
controller.line2: Private medical practice, physician for interdisciplinary medicine

intro.heading: 2. Introduction
intro.text: This privacy policy informs you about the processing of personal data on the website vivecura.com. Appointment scheduling and treatment in the practice itself are subject to medical confidentiality and to separate data protection notices, which will be provided to you at the practice.

dataTypes.heading: 3. Which data we process
list: Technical data on every page request (IP address, browser and device information, referrer, timestamp, requested content)
Information you provide when interacting with embedded services (e.g. clicking on the Doctolib widget or on links to social networks)
Analytics and advertising identifiers, where you consent to cookies and comparable technologies

healthData.heading: 4. Note regarding health data
healthData.text: This website is not intended for the processing of health data. Please do not submit any diagnoses, findings or other sensitive health information via this website, via social networks or by other unencrypted means. For medical concerns, please use the appointment booking or speak to us in person at the practice.

hosting.heading: 5. Hosting and technical provision
hosting.p1: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. The source code of the website is managed at GitHub, Inc., 88 Colin P Kelly Jr Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA.
hosting.p2: Each time the website is accessed, technical data such as IP address, time of access, browser type and the page accessed are processed automatically. This is technically necessary in order to provide the website in a stable and secure manner.
hosting.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in the secure technical operation of the website).
hosting.transfer: Both Vercel and GitHub are US companies. Data transfers to the USA take place on the basis of standard contractual clauses pursuant to Art. 46 (2) lit. c GDPR and, where applicable, on the basis of the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (adequacy decision pursuant to Art. 45 GDPR).

fonts.heading: 6. Fonts
fonts.text: Fonts are served locally from our server. No connection is made to external font providers such as Google Fonts.

doctolib.heading: 7. Appointment booking via Doctolib
doctolib.p1: This website embeds a widget or link to the appointment booking service of Doctolib GmbH, Mehringdamm 51, 10961 Berlin.
doctolib.p2: When you interact with the Doctolib widget or click the booking link, you will be redirected to Doctolib's service. The appointment booking itself and the processing of the data entered take place directly through Doctolib as an independent controller. Doctolib's privacy terms apply to that processing:
doctolib.legalBasis: Legal basis for the integration of the widget and the related data transmission: Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR (pre-contractual measures, initiation of an appointment) and Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in providing a convenient booking option).

youtube.heading: 8. Embedded YouTube videos
youtube.p1: Videos from the YouTube platform (operated by Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland) may be embedded on this website. Where possible we use the extended privacy mode (youtube-nocookie.com), under which YouTube states that it only sets cookies once you actively start the video.
youtube.p2: As soon as you play a YouTube video, Google may collect personal data such as your IP address and usage information and transfer it to servers in the USA.
youtube.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR (consent). Videos are only loaded after you have given your consent via the consent banner.

socialNetworks.heading: 9. Links to social networks
socialNetworks.intro: On this website you will find links to our profiles at:
list: Instagram (Meta Platforms Ireland Limited, Merrion Road, Dublin 4, Ireland)
TikTok (TikTok Technology Limited, 10 Earlsfort Terrace, Dublin 2, Ireland)
YouTube (Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland)
LinkedIn (LinkedIn Ireland Unlimited Company, Wilton Plaza, Wilton Place, Dublin 2, Ireland)
socialNetworks.note: These are pure hyperlinks. No content from these platforms is embedded directly into the website. Data is only transferred to these services when you click the respective link and thus actively visit the platform. From that point onwards, the privacy terms of the respective provider apply.

analytics.heading: 10. Google Analytics
analytics.p1: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland ("Google").
analytics.p2: Google Analytics uses cookies and similar technologies that enable an analysis of the use of the website. The information generated about your use of this website is generally transferred to a Google server and stored there, including in the USA. IP addresses are shortened within the EU before storage (IP anonymisation).
analytics.purpose: Purpose: analysis of usage behaviour in order to optimise the website.
analytics.dataProcessed: Data processed: anonymised IP address, device and browser information, pages visited, time spent on site, referrer, approximate geographic origin.
analytics.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR (consent). Processing only takes place if you have given consent via the consent banner. You can withdraw your consent at any time by opening the cookie settings.
analytics.transfer: Data transfer to the USA: data is transferred on the basis of the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (Art. 45 GDPR) and additionally on the basis of standard contractual clauses (Art. 46 GDPR).

googleAds.heading: 11. Google Ads conversion tracking
googleAds.p1: This website uses Google Ads conversion tracking, a service provided by Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland.
googleAds.p2: Conversion tracking allows us to measure the effectiveness of advertisements. A cookie is set when you click on an ad. If you subsequently visit a specific page of our website, Google and we are able to recognise that you clicked on the ad and were redirected to that page. We only receive aggregated statistical evaluations. Your identity remains unknown to us.
googleAds.purpose: Purpose: measuring the success of advertising campaigns.
googleAds.dataProcessed: Data processed: cookie ID, time of click, target page visited, IP address, device and browser information.
googleAds.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR (consent). Processing only takes place if you have given consent via the consent banner. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
googleAds.transfer: Data transfer to the USA: on the basis of the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (Art. 45 GDPR) and additionally on the basis of standard contractual clauses (Art. 46 GDPR).

cookies.heading: 12. Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.p1: This website uses cookies and comparable technologies (e.g. local storage) which store or retrieve information on your device.
cookies.p2: Strictly necessary cookies that are required for the secure and functional operation of the website are used without consent (§ 25 (2) No. 2 TTDSG; Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR).
cookies.p3: All other cookies, in particular those used for analytics and advertising purposes (Google Analytics, Google Ads), are only used after your express consent (§ 25 (1) TTDSG; Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR). You give this consent via our consent banner on your first visit to the website.
cookies.p4: You can withdraw your consent at any time with effect for the future, either by opening the cookie settings on the website or by sending us an email.

recipients.heading: 13. Recipients of your data
recipients.intro: Your data may be transferred to the following recipients:
list: Hosting provider: Vercel Inc., USA
Source code version control: GitHub, Inc., USA
Appointment booking: Doctolib GmbH, Germany
Analytics and advertising (only with consent): Google Ireland Limited, Ireland / Google LLC, USA
Authorities and public bodies, where required by law

dataTransfer.heading: 14. Data transfers outside the EU
dataTransfer.intro: Some of the providers mentioned above are based in the USA or transfer data there. Such transfers only take place on the basis of permissible transfer mechanisms under Chapter V of the GDPR:
list: Adequacy decision of the European Commission of 10 July 2023 for the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (Art. 45 GDPR), provided the respective provider is certified under that framework
Standard contractual clauses pursuant to Art. 46 (2) lit. c GDPR, supplemented by additional technical and organisational measures

retention.heading: 15. Retention period
retention.intro: We only store personal data for as long as is necessary for the respective purpose, or as long as statutory retention obligations apply. Afterwards, the data is deleted or anonymised.
list: Server log data: generally a maximum of 14 days, after which it is automatically deleted
Google Analytics: maximum of 14 months
Consent-based processing: until consent is withdrawn

rights.heading: 16. Your rights as a data subject
rights.intro: You have the following rights under the GDPR:
list: Right of access to the personal data processed (Art. 15 GDPR)
Right to rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data (Art. 16 GDPR)
Right to erasure of your data (Art. 17 GDPR)
Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
Right to object to the processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
Right to withdraw consent given, with effect for the future (Art. 7 (3) GDPR)
rights.exercise: To exercise your rights, an informal message is sufficient at
rights.complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority. The competent authority is in particular the one at your habitual residence, place of work or the place of the alleged infringement.
rights.authorityLabel: Competent supervisory authority at the controller's seat:
rights.authorityName: Berlin Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information

changes.heading: 17. Changes to this privacy policy
changes.text: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy if the legal framework or the technologies used on the website change. The current version is always available on this page.

infusions.seoTitle: IV Infusion Therapy Berlin – NAD+, Vitamin C, Amino Acids
infusions.seoDescription: High-dose IV infusion therapies in Berlin: NAD+, Vitamin C, glutathione, amino acids, micronutrients. Medically indicated and individually tailored.
infusions.shotsSubtitle: Targeted active ingredients as a quick injection — no long sitting required.

vitaminD.desc: A single shot can replace months of daily oral intake.
vitaminD.popupDesc: Most people take vitamin D daily as a tablet and hope it gets absorbed. Often it doesn't. Because D3 is fat-soluble: without optimal bile flow, a healthy gut and simultaneous fat intake, much of it can simply pass through. This shot can solve the problem once and for all: 100,000 IU directly into the muscle, straight into the depot, can work for months.
vitaminD.whyText:
Vitamin D is not a normal vitamin. It can act as a hormone and may be involved in over 200 gene processes: immune defense, bone formation, muscle strength, mood, sleep, testosterone, thyroid. Studies show that over 80% of Germans have suboptimal levels, many without knowing it.

For comparison: a 1,000 IU tablet daily for 3 months — 90 tablets, remembering every day, and depending on gut health only a fraction actually arrives. This shot? One ampoule, five minutes, directly into the muscle — can deliver 100,000 IU straight into the body's depot, 100% available, without the detour through gut or bile. What tablets try to achieve over a quarter of a year, this shot can accomplish in a single appointment.

magnesium.desc: A single infusion can achieve what tablets can barely manage in weeks.
magnesium.popupDesc: Anyone who knows magnesium knows it as a tablet. Anyone who has had it intravenously once will never go back to tablets only!
magnesium.whyTitle: Why this shot — and why as a series?
magnesium.whyText:
It's not about filling up stores. It's about what happens in the moment magnesium goes directly into the blood, and what happens when you repeat that moment.

IV magnesium can instantly relax the smooth muscle of the blood vessels, lower blood pressure and dramatically boost circulation. Many patients feel it live: an intense warmth spreads from the arm across the whole body. That's real vasodilation — the body literally opens up! Muscles can let go, the nervous system can wind down, heart rhythm can stabilize.

In chronic exhaustion and fatigue, exactly this short-term reset can be decisive. Not because the body is permanently changed afterwards, but because every repetition trains the nervous system to enter this state again. Like a reset button that becomes easier to press with each session. Applied as a series, this brief, deep relaxation can turn into lasting recovery; measurable in HRV, sleep quality and energy levels.

glutathion.desc: Directly intravenous for immediate bioavailability at the cellular level.
glutathion.popupDesc: The body produces glutathione itself, but stress, toxins, age and nutrient deficiencies deplete the stores quickly. Taken orally it is barely absorbed: stomach acid and gut enzymes break it down before it arrives. This shot delivers reduced glutathione directly into the vein: instantly bioavailable, instantly effective. The cells get what they really need.
glutathion.whyText: Glutathione is the body's most powerful endogenous antioxidant. It neutralizes free radicals, regenerates other antioxidants such as vitamin C and E, and is a central component of liver detoxification. At the same time it protects mitochondria, supports the immune system and can brighten the skin from within. For anyone who is chronically exhausted, has been exposed to many toxins, or simply wants to regenerate at the cellular level, this is the most direct way.

services.vitaminC_desc: Vitamin C infusions for energy, immune support and wellbeing.

spezielleTherapien.seoDescription: Specialized therapies in Berlin: ketamine, heavy metal detox, mold, gut reset, hormones, burnout. Individual medical consultation in 45 minutes.

hero.title: Special Therapies
hero.subtitle: Individual Consultation · 45 Minutes
hero.description: In a detailed consultation, we take the time to look at your dental health holistically. Together, we develop an individual treatment plan tailored to your needs and wishes.

a1.title: What can I expect?
a1.content: During your first consultation, we conduct a comprehensive examination and discuss your dental health in detail. We take the time to understand your wishes and concerns, and create a customized treatment plan. State-of-the-art diagnostics and compassionate care are at the heart of everything we do.

a2.title: How do I prepare?
a2.content: Please bring your insurance card and, if available, any recent X-rays or findings. Feel free to note down any questions or concerns you'd like to discuss beforehand. No special preparation is necessary — we take care of everything else.

a3.title: Prices & Insurance
a3.content: The costs for special therapies vary depending on the treatment. Many services are covered by private health insurance. For publicly insured patients, we are happy to provide a transparent cost estimate. Talk to us — we advise honestly and without hidden costs.

grid.title: Special Therapies
grid.subtitle: Specialized treatments for your dental health — from prevention to aesthetics.

ketamin.title: Ketamine
ketamin.desc: Individualized ketamine therapy for treatment-resistant depression, anxiety disorders and chronic pain.

schwermetall.title: Heavy Metal Detox
schwermetall.desc: Targeted elimination of toxic heavy metals to relieve cells, nervous system, and immune function.

schimmel.title: Mold
schimmel.desc: Diagnostics and therapy for chronic mold exposure and the symptoms it causes.

darmreset.title: Gut Reset
darmreset.desc: Restoring and regenerating the gut flora as a foundation for immunity, energy, and mental balance.

hormone.title: Hormones
hormone.desc: Precise hormone diagnostics and individual balance concepts for energy, mood, and performance.

burnout.title: Burnout
burnout.desc: Holistic guidance from exhaustion back into balance — with focus on the nervous system and regeneration.

philosophy.title: Our Holistic Approach
philosophy.p1: At Die Drei Zahnärzte, we don't view dental health in isolation, but as part of your overall well-being. Our special therapies combine cutting-edge dentistry with a holistic understanding of health.
philosophy.p2: Every treatment plan is individually tailored to you. We take the time for thorough diagnostics, explain every step clearly, and personally accompany you through the entire treatment process.

t1.quote: The consultation was incredibly thorough. I felt comfortable right away and knew exactly what to expect.
t1.name: Sarah M.

t2.quote: Finally a practice that really takes its time. The implants look perfect and feel natural.
t2.name: Thomas K.

t3.quote: After years of dental anxiety, this was my first positive experience at a dentist.
t3.name: Lisa W.

t4.quote: Professional, empathetic, and up to date with the latest technology. Highly recommended!
t4.name: Michael R.

t5.quote: The whitening result exceeded my expectations. The team is simply amazing.
t5.name: Anna S.

s1.title: Micronutrients
s1.desc: We find out where you're lacking micronutrients and support you with the right supplements, infusions and nutritional advice so your cells can produce steady, sustainable energy.

s2.title: Holistic Diagnostics
s2.desc: Using state-of-the-art diagnostics, we analyze your dental health in the overall context of your body and identify connections that others miss.

s3.title: Regenerative Therapy
s3.desc: With regenerative procedures, we promote your body's natural healing and support the development of healthy dental and tissue structures.

s4.title: Stress Reduction
s4.desc: Chronic stress directly impacts your dental health. We help you identify stress factors and offer treatments that relax body and mind.

s5.title: Prevention & Longevity
s5.desc: Our preventive approach aims to stop problems before they arise — for lifelong healthy teeth and a strong immune system.

s6.title: Holistic Wellness
s6.desc: We combine dentistry with holistic health promotion, creating a treatment experience that brings body and soul into harmony.

s7.title: Immune Support
s7.desc: A strong immune system starts in the mouth. We strengthen your body's natural defenses through targeted therapies and support your natural resilience.

bottomCta.title: Ready for Your Personal Consultation?
bottomCta.description: Book an appointment now and get individual advice on our special therapies.

healthCheck.seoTitle: Diagnostics & Health Check Berlin – Functional Medicine
healthCheck.seoDescription: Advanced diagnostics in Berlin: genetics, whole-blood analysis, BIA, HRV, microbiome, heavy metals. Holistic health check as the foundation for targeted therapy.

bia.title: Metabolic Analysis (BIA)
bia.desc: Get a clear overview of your body. From muscle and fat percentage to cellular health. We analyze energy, hydration and balance — so nutrition, training and recovery can be optimized in a targeted way.

hrv.title: Stress Analysis (HRV)
hrv.desc: Understand how your body handles stress and recovery. We make visible what often stays hidden in everyday life — for more balance, better sleep and sustainable regeneration.

genetik.title: Genetics & Epigenetics
genetik.desc: Your genes show your potential, your lifestyle decides how it's expressed. We analyze how your body works and reacts — for personalized strategies that truly fit you.

naehrstoff.title: Nutrient Analysis
naehrstoff.desc: Quick, easy and without a blood draw. We detect possible deficiencies and burdens early on — the ideal foundation for targeted next steps.

labor.title: Lab (Whole Blood & Urine)
labor.desc: Deeper insights into nutrients, hormones and inflammatory processes. Precise diagnostics at the cellular level instead of surface values — for sound, individual treatment planning.

darm.title: Gut Function
darm.desc: The gut is the foundation of your health. We analyze the microbiome, digestion and immune function — for more well-being, energy and inner balance.

schimmel.title: Mold & Mycotoxins
schimmel.desc: Detect burdens that often go unnoticed for a long time. We examine the connections between environment and symptoms — for clarity and matching therapy approaches.

schwermetalle.title: Heavy Metals & Chelation Therapy
schwermetalle.desc: Make hidden burdens visible. Diagnostics and therapy are medically supervised — for safe and structured detox concepts.

schlaf.title: Sleep Analysis
schlaf.desc: Understand your sleep instead of just rating it. We analyze your nightly regeneration and recovery capacity — for an individual plan toward better, deeper sleep.

hero.title: Diagnostics
hero.subtitle: In a single appointment you'll receive in-depth diagnostics, a conversation about your personal health, and an individual plan tailored precisely to your body and your life.

g1.title: Holistic Diagnostics
g1.desc: Digital X-rays, intraoral camera and clinical examination for a complete picture of your dental health.

g2.title: 60 Min. Medical Consultation
g2.desc: Personal conversation with your dentist about findings, symptoms and your individual health goals.

g3.title: Your Individual Treatment Plan
g3.desc: Clear recommendations, prioritized actions and a roadmap for your long-term dental health.

whyUs.title: Why VIVECURA?
whyUs.subtitle: We combine cutting-edge diagnostics with holistic care — no assembly-line medicine, but genuine attention.

w1.title: Causes, not symptoms
w1.desc: We don't treat what shows up on the surface — we treat what's behind it. Our diagnostics go deeper than the usual standard and uncover what conventional exams often miss.

w2.title: Precision, not guesswork
w2.desc: Every recommendation is based on your individual values. No one-size-fits-all, no gut feeling. What we recommend is grounded in measurable evidence.

w3.title: A picture that fits together
w3.desc: We look at your blood, your gut, your hormones, micronutrients, and your lifestyle in context — because health is never a single finding.

focusSection.title: The Most Common Complaints
focusSection.subtitle: Every check is individual. Choose the focus that best matches your symptoms and goals.

s2.title: Metabolic Analysis
s2.desc: Bioimpedance measurement of phase angle, cellular energy assessment & body composition (muscle/fat, hydration).

s3.title: HRV Stress Analysis
s3.desc: Stress, recovery & burnout tendencies. Seeing mental health in biology.

s4.title: Nutrient Analysis
s4.desc: Spectrophotometry (hand scan) for rapid assessment of numerous vitamins, minerals and heavy metals in tissue.

s5.title: Blood Draw on Indication
s5.desc: Selection from one of the largest parameter lists in Germany (partnership with IMD Berlin).

includes.title: Everything you need in one appointment!

i1.title: Diagnostics
i1.desc: Targeted lab analyses, functional tests and clinical assessment. Tailored individually to your symptoms.

i2.title: Consultation
i2.desc: Before we recommend anything, we understand your body, your story and your goals.

i4.title: Mentoring
i4.desc: We accompany you long term, adapt your plan, and stay by your side until you truly arrive where you want to be.

benefitsSection.title: Where Diagnostics Meets Real Care
benefitsSection.subtitle: State-of-the-art dentistry, combined with personal attention and holistic understanding.

b2.desc: Detailed discussion of your results and personal health goals.

b3.desc: Clear recommendations including lifestyle advice and personal treatment options.

b4.title: Ongoing Care
b4.desc: Follow-up appointments and regular check-ups to accompany your progress.

t1.quote: Mr. Jarmoukli is an exceptional doctor with a deep, holistic approach. You can feel right away that it's not about quick fixes for him, but about sustainable health.

q1.title: What does the Health Check include?
q1.content: The Health Check includes comprehensive diagnostics (digital X-rays, clinical assessment, specialized tests if needed), a 45-minute consultation with your dentist and an individual health plan with clear recommendations.

q2.title: How do I choose the right focus?
q2.content: Choose the focus that best matches your current symptoms or goals. If you're unsure, we're happy to help you decide — just reach out.

q3.title: How do I prepare?
q3.content: Please bring your insurance card and, if available, any recent findings or X-rays. Feel free to note down questions beforehand. No special preparation is needed.

q4.title: Is the cost covered by insurance?
q4.content: Many services are covered by private health insurance. For publicly insured patients, we provide a transparent cost estimate. Talk to us — we advise honestly and without hidden costs.

q5.title: How are the results discussed?
q5.content: All findings are explained in detail during your personal consultation. You also receive a written summary with your individual health plan.

q6.title: Do I have to start treatment afterwards?
q6.content: No, the Health Check is non-binding. You receive recommendations and can decide at your own pace whether and which treatments make sense for you.

bottomCta.title: Ready for Your Health Check?
bottomCta.desc: Book an appointment now and gain clarity about your dental health.
